svg.title: WSP recording icon Variant 4 — all Windows sizes
svg.desc: Variant 4 recording icon (indigo background, red microphone, REC badge, tall waveform bars) at 256, 128, 64, 48, 32, 24 and 16 pixels with usage labels, plus taskbar and tray previews alongside the idle icon.
svg.text: Explorer list (32 px) — idle row vs recording row
How to build the recording .ico file
At 32 px and below the REC badge is replaced by a red dot — this is intentional and pixel-correct at small sizes.
Both .ico files (idle + recording) should be embedded in the .exe via PyInstaller; the recording one is loaded at runtime only.
